feedback_summary:
- Tests failed due to infrastructure/environment issues (not code defects). Test command: pytest tests/test_shared.py -v --tb=short. Remediation options: (1) Add mock fixtures for external services, (2) Use SQLite for test database, (3) Mark integration tests with @pytest.mark.integration and exclude via -m 'not integration'.
